creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
When using php4-zlib from ports php-function GetImageSize does not work for swf files. Full description of the problem: http://bugs.php.net/bug.php?id=29611

When recompiling php4 from the source with --with-zlib option all works well. So there must be a way to compile php4-zlib from main php4 port (not as extension).
